overall.description: A first-person view from a ship's bridge in a maritime simulator game. The vessel moves steadily through open ocean during twilight, with three navigation monitors visible including a rotating radar display. The scene features cool blue-grey tones and industrial ship architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge command center with navigation displays

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems and monitoring the rotating radar while cruising through open ocean waters

entered.detail: Navigation monitor showing chart data with cyan blue interface
Circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep arm and concentric range rings
Depth sounder monitor showing underwater terrain profile in blue
Forward deck of the vessel with metal railings and bow structure
Metal safety railings along the edge of the bridge overlooking the bow
Expansive body of water extending to the horizon under overcast skies

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous first-person view from a ship's bridge during a maritime simulation. The vessel maintains steady forward motion through open ocean waters during the blue hour, with the radar display continuously rotating overhead. Three electronic navigation monitors dominate the upper frame while the ship's bow cuts through calm seas toward the distant horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as the vessel glides through the open ocean during the blue hour. It begins with a view of the ship's bow cutting through calm seas, moving consistently toward a distant, hazy horizon. As the vessel advances, the focus remains on the industrial architecture of the bridge, where three electronic navigation monitors dominate the upper frame. The scene is defined by the rhythmic rotation of the radar display overhead, which persists as the ship continues its forward trajectory through the cool, blue-grey waters.
